scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix next-app && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin-dashboard && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
scripts.dev:lite: npx concurrently -n "NEXT,API" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev:next" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:lite:vite: npx concurrently -n "UI,API" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "NEXT,ADM,API,WKR,VID" -c "cyan,magenta,green,yellow,blue" "npm run dev:next" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:video"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:next && npm run build:admin && npm run build:video
scripts.clean: rm -rf next-app/.next frontend/dist admin-dashboard/dist video-service/target backend/__pycache__
